calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Aug-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction.

The People of the State of California's unopposed Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction, is granted.

A proposed order and proposed stipulated judgment and preliminary injunction are submitted for the court's review.

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/BZ)
